creator: crb@ChrisBowman.com
text:
It may indeed be power.  I was in the BIOS today and see that the BIOS/motherboard has the capability to show the power supply levels.  Here is what it shows:

Nominal Actual
==============
 3.3v   2.928v
 5.0v   4.779v
12.0v  11.597v

I know that there is a tolerance but I don't know what this is for these buses.
However I do see that the 2.928v values is highlighted in red in the BIOS which
I suppose must mean that it's out of spec.

I guess I'll have to see if I can get a replacement power supply and see how that
works.
